title: A Father’s Life Is Erased
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Kuma, Unknown person #7, Bonney, Marines, Chopper, Unknown person #8 as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Bonney-chan! It's time for your medicine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Am I...am I imagining things? I could've sworn Bonney was huge just now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YUCK! DOES THE MEDICINE HAFTA BE THIS BITTER?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That just means it's working!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if! This is just some horrid lemon flavored placebo!*

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Hey, Granny Conney...

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Why're we HIDIN' Bonney's abilities again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to be safe. You know what they say, "a talented Hawk hides its claws..."

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: NAVY SCIENCE DIVISION - Lab 08

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Amazing, Doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I can't believe you did it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we just have to lift the brain and lab using island clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: about half of what you see here is holographic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had planned for punk hazard to be like this too, y'know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must admit, that cut suits you:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PE PE PE! I feel light as a feather!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuma, I heard you're going lose your sense of individuality.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder which of us has the most checkered fate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The human that lacks free will or the clone that doesn't.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: knock it off, stussy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just as human as the rest of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What exactly should I expect...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...When my personality is erased?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll put it like this... you may already have a reputation for being totally obedient...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but what would you do if you were asked to kill a child?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What it means is... you'll lose not only your memories but any empathy or humanity holding you back from fulfilling such a command.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That being said, you should retain some degree of free will until the process is fully complete!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That'll give you roughly one more year...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Another letter?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll keep writing till I run out of time...

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Bonney deserves to know how I feel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to send her a whole lifetime's worth of love before this year is over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Heh heh! (O

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How sweet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bonney's almost 9 now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I wonder how big she's gotten?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Do you think she's changed a lot?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know when you'll get this letter, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Happy Birthday, Bonney!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm back at Yeapunk's lab. Things are busy around here--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Happy Birth- Day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: BOMNEY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Congratu- Lations!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
